validate.notes: Fixed two issues: 1) solve.sh used a git patch that failed to apply due to file formatting differences - replaced with sed and Python script approach that directly modifies files. 2) test_outputs.py had newline escaping issues in Node.js scripts (\n was being interpreted as actual newlines) - fixed by using regex split(/\\r?\\n/) instead of split('\n'). All 7 tests now pass on gold, 4 fail on NOP as expected.

tests_added: test_repo_biome_lint - Runs Biome linter on src/ and webview-ui/src/ (pass_to_pass)
test_repo_biome_format - Runs Biome format check on src/ and webview-ui/src/ (pass_to_pass)
notes: TypeScript typecheck (npm run check-types) requires protobuf generation which fails in this environment
Unit tests and webview-ui tests require protobuf-generated files that are not available
Biome lint and format checks work without proto files and complete in ~7s and ~0.5s respectively
The commands tested pass on the base commit and will verify candidate solutions don't break code style

improve.notes: Fixed test_outputs.py newline escaping issues and solve.sh patch application
